CustomField.description: Priority score for the Last Activity on the school object related to the Combined Funnel. 04/10/23 - Flagged to be deprecated (Sprint 5 - 2023)
CustomField.formula: IF( SaaS_Onboarding_Funnel_Stage__c = 'Logging Actions', IF( Last_Activity_Date__c >= TODAY()-2, -5, IF( AND( Last_Activity_Date__c < TODAY()-2, Last_Activity_Date__c >= TODAY()-6 ), 0, IF( OR( Last_Activity_Date__c < TODAY()-6, ISBLANK(Last_Activity_Date__c) ), 10, 0 ))), NULL )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Priority score for the Last Activity on the school object related to the Combined Funnel.
CustomField.label: x_Last Activity Logged Score
